_comment: Ranking weighting lives here, NOT in code. Tune without touching the engine. The 9 weights should sum to 1.0. Normalization bounds map each raw metric onto 0..1 before weighting.
_optionalNote: Extra metrics from parameters.md Groups 4-5. Off by default; toggle in the UI. Each contributes its weight to the score ONLY when enabled=true.

deathOvers._scalingNote: Converts bowling economy (runs/over) onto the batting strike-rate scale (runs/100 balls): 100/6 = 16.67. Net = deathBatSR - deathBowlEcon*scalingFactor.
